metadata.promise: Une première grande journée en ville qui transforme la timidité en fierté douce
metadata.editorialPositioning: Album premium belge qui célèbre les petits courages du quotidien avec chaleur et authenticité

dedication.text_template: Pour {child_name}, petit explorateur des merveilles bruxelloises

page_1.text_template: {child_name} serre la main de Papa. Les pavés brillent au soleil. Le grand monde l'attend.

page_2.text_template: Au marché Saint-Géry, un pigeon coquin s'envole avec le béret ! {child_name} court et l'attrape. Bravo !

page_3.text_template: Dans la boulangerie aux carreaux bleus, {child_name} dit tout seul : 'Un pain au chocolat, madame !' Quelle fierté !

page_4.text_template: {child_name} grimpe au sommet ! Il descend en criant de joie. Papa applaudit sous les marronniers.

page_5.text_template: Maintenant, {child_name} guide Papa. Il compte les trams bleus : 'Un, deux, trois qui passent !'

page_6.text_template: {child_name} chuchote sa journée à Nounours. Ses yeux se ferment, tout heureux.

summary.text_template: {child_name} a découvert que le courage, c'est oser un petit pas nouveau dans sa belle ville.

backCover.text_template: Une histoire de courage et de fierté dans les rues ensoleillées de Bruxelles

book.title_template: My Big Day in the City

cover.title_template: My Big Day in the City

dedication.text_template: For {child_name}, little explorer of Brussels wonders

page_1.text_template: {child_name} squeezes Daddy's hand tight. Cobblestones shimmer in sunlight. The big world waits.

page_2.text_template: At Saint-Géry market, a cheeky pigeon swoops off with the beret! {child_name} chases and catches it. Well done!

page_3.text_template: In the blue-tiled bakery, {child_name} says all alone: 'One chocolate pastry, please!' What pride!

page_4.text_template: {child_name} climbs to the very top! He whooshes down shouting with glee. Daddy cheers beneath the chestnuts.

page_5.text_template: Now {child_name} leads the way home. He counts the blue trams: 'One, two, three rolling by!'

page_6.text_template: {child_name} whispers his day to Teddy Bear. His eyes flutter closed, perfectly happy.

summary.text_template: {child_name} discovered that courage means taking one small brave step in his beautiful city.

backCover.text_template: A story of courage and pride in the sunlit streets of Brussels

book.title_template: Mijn Grote Dag in de Stad

cover.title_template: Mijn Grote Dag in de Stad

dedication.text_template: Voor {child_name}, kleine ontdekker van Brusselse wonderen

page_1.text_template: {child_name} knijpt Papa's hand stevig vast. Kasseien glinsteren in zonlicht. De grote wereld wacht.

page_2.text_template: Op de Sint-Goriksmarkt vliegt een brutale duif weg met de baret! {child_name} rent achter {child_name} aan. Goed zo!

page_3.text_template: In de blauwbetegelde bakkerij zegt {child_name} helemaal alleen: 'Eén chocoladekoek, alstublieft!' Wat een trots!

page_4.text_template: {child_name} klimt helemaal naar de top! {child_name} zoeft naar beneden en roept van blijdschap. Papa juicht onder de kastanjes.

page_5.text_template: Nu wijst {child_name} de weg naar huis. {child_name} telt de blauwe trams: 'Eén, twee, drie die voorbijrijden!'

page_6.text_template: {child_name} fluistert zijn dag tegen Teddybeer. Van {child_name} oogjes vallen dicht, helemaal gelukkig.

summary.text_template: {child_name} ontdekte dat moed betekent één kleine dappere stap zetten in zijn mooie stad.

backCover.text_template: Een verhaal van moed en trots in de zonovergoten straten van Brussel

style_rules: Premium gouache illustration with rich watercolor washes
Warm golden hour lighting throughout urban scenes
Belgian Art Nouveau architectural details in backgrounds
Soft edges with gentle color bleeding typical of watercolor
Cinematic composition with foreground, midground, background layers
Pastel color palette with warm ochres, soft blues, gentle greens
Storybook illustration quality with premium artistic finish
visualBible.palette: Warm urban pastels: golden honey, soft sky blue, sage green, cream white, gentle rose, warm ochre
visualBible.lighting: Golden hour morning light with soft shadows, creating warmth and security
compositionRules: Child hero always positioned in lower third for age-appropriate perspective
Belgian urban elements integrated naturally in backgrounds
Clear visual hierarchy with hero as focal point
Gentle depth of field with soft background details
Emotional beats emphasized through lighting and composition

identityRules: Small child aged 3-4 with bright curious eyes
Wearing a soft yellow cardigan over blue overalls
Short tousled brown hair with natural cowlick
Small red sneakers with white laces
Carries a small canvas shoulder bag
Height reaches parent's hip level consistently
heroBible.characterDesign: A petite preschooler with warm brown eyes, gentle freckles across the nose, wearing a cozy yellow cardigan over blue denim overalls. The child has an earnest, thoughtful expression with naturally tousled brown hair and small red sneakers that ground them as authentically young.
forbiddenDrift: No aging up or down between scenes
No changes to clothing colors or style
No dramatic expression changes that break character
No size inconsistencies relative to background elements
No hair color or style variations
No removal of signature yellow cardigan

sceneDefinitions.midground: charming Belgian street with Art Nouveau details
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Premium gouache illustration of a small child in yellow cardigan standing on a charming Belgian street, Art Nouveau architecture, warm morning light, watercolor style, storybook quality, gentle urban scene
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, words, letters, dark atmosphere, scary elements, adult proportions

sceneDefinitions.foreground: child holding parent's hand at threshold
must_show: child in yellow cardigan holding adult hand
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Gouache illustration of small child in yellow cardigan holding adult hand at doorway threshold, bright Belgian city street beyond, Art Nouveau buildings, warm morning sunlight, watercolor washes, storybook illustration
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, letters, dark atmosphere, scary urban elements, adult child proportions

sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Watercolor illustration of small child in yellow cardigan chasing friendly pigeon carrying hat, Belgian market with colorful stalls, warm dappled light through awnings, gouache style, whimsical scene
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, words, scary birds, chaotic market, dark corners

sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Gouache illustration of small child in yellow cardigan at Belgian bakery counter, warm smiling baker, display of croissants and pastries, cozy interior lighting, watercolor warmth, storybook quality
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, letters, stern faces, overwhelming details, dark bakery

sceneDefinitions.foreground: child at top of playground slide
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Dramatic gouache illustration of small child in yellow cardigan triumphant at top of slide, low angle view, Belgian park setting, golden sunlight, parent clapping below, watercolor celebration, heroic moment
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, words, dangerous playground, empty scene, dark atmosphere

sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Watercolor illustration of small child in yellow cardigan confidently leading parent down Belgian street, colorful trams passing, Art Nouveau residential buildings, warm late morning light, gouache style
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, letters, busy traffic, unsafe streets, industrial setting

sceneDefinitions.foreground: child in bed with stuffed animal
sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Tender gouache illustration of small child in yellow pajamas in cozy bed, talking to teddy bear, warm lamp light, Belgian home interior, peaceful evening, watercolor softness, bedtime serenity
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, words, bright lights, active scenes, daytime lighting

sceneDefinitions.promptTemplate: Elegant gouache detail of Belgian Art Nouveau architecture, warm morning light on cobblestone street, gentle watercolor washes, premium storybook quality, inviting urban scene
sceneDefinitions.negativePrompt: text, letters, people, busy street, modern architecture

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, words, letters, captions, speech bubbles, dark atmosphere, scary elements, adult proportions on child, inconsistent clothing

rules: All story pages must advance the comfort-to-courage arc
Page 4 must be the emotional climax with triumph moment
Belgian cultural elements must appear in settings and prompts
Hero consistency must be maintained across all scenes
No text may appear inside generated images
All text must be short and read-aloud friendly

editorialScore.rationale: Strong emotional arc with clear comfort-to-courage progression, authentic Belgian setting, age-appropriate language, and meaningful climax moment

imageabilityScore.rationale: Clear visual scenes with specific Belgian elements, good composition guidance, premium gouache style well-defined

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Detailed character design with specific clothing and features, strong identity rules and drift prevention

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: All three locales complete with semantically aligned content, consistent emotional tone across languages
